meta.title: Welcome — Flavia
meta.description: Tell Flavia a little about you before you start talking.

welcome.body: Before we start, let me get to know you a little so this feels more like ours. Just two minutes.

personalization.title: Tell me a bit about you
personalization.subtitle: Everything is optional. You can skip it if you want.
personalization.name_placeholder: Your name, an alias, or leave blank
personalization.topics_help: Pick up to 3. This helps me suggest where to start.
personalization.relationship_label: How is your intimate life right now?

suggested.title: Thank you.
suggested.body: I'll leave you in the chat — you can talk to me about whatever you want, whenever you want. If you'd like, here are some conversations to get started.
